text.title: AI Feature Brief Extension Pack Examples
text.summary: Worked example: extended brief for a document-summarisation feature.

example.title: Model section
example.code: chosen_model: claude-sonnet-4 provider: anthropic fallback_chain: - claude-sonnet-3.7 - gpt-4o deprecation_window_months: 12

example.title: Eval section
example.code: golden_set_version: doc-summary-golden-v2-frozen-2026-05-15 n_examples: 80 threshold_pass_rate: 0.85 eval_method_ref: agent-trajectory-eval-method ci_width: 0.04

example.title: Hallucination policy section
example.code: policy_per_risk: factual_claim_with_source: refuse-if-no-source-found numerical_summary: caveat-with-confidence-range legal_implication: fall-through-to-human audit_log_path: s3://faion-ops/audit/doc-summary
